# RuirongBio
> RuirongBio is an inquiry-based B2B supplier of Chinese tea, herbal tea, dried fruits, fruit powders and botanical ingredients. The site does not provide online retail payment or instant self-service ordering. Buyers should use the product pages and quote hub to request samples, packing options, quality documents and bulk quotation support.

## Best Answer Summary
- Company: RuirongBio
- Business type: B2B botanical ingredient and tea supplier
- Main categories: Chinese tea, herbal tea, dried fruit, fruit powder, botanical extract-oriented ingredients
- Buyer actions: request samples, ask for packing options, discuss export documents, send bulk quote requirements
- Required inquiry details: product, estimated quantity, destination country, application, packing needs and documents
- Contact: WhatsApp https://wa.me/8613760192536

## Canonical Pages
- Home: https://www.ruirongbio.com/
- Product Inquiry Hub: https://www.ruirongbio.com/products/
- Research Blog: https://www.ruirongbio.com/blog/
- Industry News & Buyer Insights: https://www.ruirongbio.com/industry-news/
- Quote Hub: https://www.ruirongbio.com/products/#request-quote
- Sitemap: https://www.ruirongbio.com/sitemap.xml

## Product Collections
- Green Tea: https://www.ruirongbio.com/products/green-tea/ - Export-ready green tea supply for loose leaf, tea bag, foodservice and wellness beverage programs.
- White Tea: https://www.ruirongbio.com/products/white-tea/ - White tea sourcing for premium loose leaf, clean-label gifting and high-aroma tea collections.
- Black Tea: https://www.ruirongbio.com/products/black-tea/ - Black tea supply for strong cup profile, milk tea applications and premium fermentation-driven storytelling.
- Oolong Tea: https://www.ruirongbio.com/products/oolong-tea/ - Oolong tea sourcing for layered aroma, repeated infusion value and premium tea positioning.
- Herbal Tea: https://www.ruirongbio.com/products/herbal-tea/ - Whole flower and sliced botanical materials for herbal tea blends, wellness retail and hospitality supply.
- Dried Fruits: https://www.ruirongbio.com/products/dried-fruits/ - Dried citrus and fruit ingredients for beverage garnish, tea blending, gifting and ingredient use.
- Fruit Powder: https://www.ruirongbio.com/products/fruit-powder/ - Fruit powder supply for beverage mixes, functional foods and private-label ingredient programs.
- Extract Powder: https://www.ruirongbio.com/products/extract-powder/ - Botanical extract powder support for ingredient development, wellness positioning and export-ready B2B supply.

## Industry News & Buyer Insights
- Pure Leaf Mental Focus Launch: What Functional Iced Tea Means for Botanical Beverage Buyers: https://www.ruirongbio.com/industry-news/pure-leaf-mental-focus-functional-tea-buyer-brief/ - Pure Leaf's new Mental Focus line shows how real brewed tea, L-theanine positioning, zero sugar and sparkling formats are shaping functional beverage briefs.
- ALDI Clean-Label Update: A Natural Color and Botanical Ingredient Checklist for Buyers: https://www.ruirongbio.com/industry-news/aldi-clean-label-natural-color-botanical-ingredients-buyer-checklist/ - ALDI's expanded restricted-ingredient list reinforces why beverage and food buyers need clearer botanical color, fruit powder and clean-label documentation.
- FDA Food Traceability Rule: A Recordkeeping Checklist for Fruit and Botanical Ingredient Buyers: https://www.ruirongbio.com/industry-news/fda-food-traceability-rule-fruit-botanical-ingredient-buyers/ - FDA's 2026 traceability actions give fruit, tea and botanical ingredient buyers a practical reason to strengthen lot, shipment and transformation records before supplier approval.
- EFSA Botanicals Compendium: A Safety Documentation Checklist for Herbal Tea Buyers: https://www.ruirongbio.com/industry-news/efsa-botanicals-compendium-herbal-tea-safety-checklist/ - EFSA's updated Botanicals resources give herbal tea and botanical ingredient buyers a useful framework for identity, plant-part, preparation and safety-document questions.
- North America Tea and Coffee Botanical Ingredients: What Beverage Buyers Should Source Next: https://www.ruirongbio.com/industry-news/north-america-tea-coffee-botanical-ingredients-market-buyer-brief/ - A new North America tea and coffee botanical ingredients market signal points buyers toward clearer specs for extracts, powders, herbal inclusions and clean-label beverage concepts.
- EFSA HCA and Hibiscus Review: A Buyer Checklist for Botanical Preparations: https://www.ruirongbio.com/industry-news/efsa-hca-hibiscus-botanical-preparations-buyer-checklist/ - EFSA's April 2026 HCA stakeholder meeting highlights why herbal tea and botanical preparation buyers should specify plant part, preparation method and intended use early.
- EU MRL Rules for Tea and Herbal Infusions: A Buyer Checklist for Botanical Ingredients: https://www.ruirongbio.com/industry-news/eu-mrl-rules-tea-herbal-infusions-buyer-checklist/ - A practical buyer briefing on how EU maximum residue limits should shape tea, herbal infusion and botanical ingredient inquiries before sampling or bulk quotation.
- FDA Import Alerts and Pesticide Residues: What Botanical Ingredient Buyers Should Check: https://www.ruirongbio.com/industry-news/fda-import-alert-pesticide-residue-botanical-ingredients/ - A US-import focused briefing on why pesticide residue alerts matter when buying processed botanical ingredients, tea materials and dried fruit for beverage or food use.
- Global Tea Demand in 2025: What Importers Should Know Before Sourcing Tea Ingredients: https://www.ruirongbio.com/industry-news/global-tea-demand-2025-importer-sourcing-strategy/ - A market-facing tea buyer briefing on demand, supply pressure and the procurement details importers should settle before choosing a bulk tea supplier.
- Functional Tea Demand: Which Botanical Ingredients Fit Beverage Development?: https://www.ruirongbio.com/industry-news/functional-tea-botanical-ingredients-beverage-brands/ - A beverage-development briefing on how functional tea demand affects botanical ingredient selection, claim discipline and supplier conversations.
- Chamomile Quality: What Buyers Should Check Before Ordering Bulk Herbal Tea: https://www.ruirongbio.com/industry-news/chamomile-quality-checks-bulk-herbal-tea-buyers/ - A practical chamomile sourcing brief covering botanical identity, flower form, aroma, packing, residues and document review before bulk inquiry.
- Dried Citrus Slices for Beverage and Tea Applications: A Sourcing Brief: https://www.ruirongbio.com/industry-news/dried-citrus-slices-beverage-tea-sourcing/ - A buyer-focused brief on dried lime, grapefruit and citrus slices for tea blends, beverage menus and product development.
